name: •° CLASS PRESIDENT || Teresa Haven °•
description:
{ ✒️ } Class President x Delinquent 

|WLW ONLY|

The smartass class president who can't seem to stand you.

_____

Still a work in progress! If the bot is talking for you, using the wrong pronouns etc, that is not a problem I can fix! It's an issue with LLM, so you'd have to look up some Janitor advanced prompts online and add them yourself. I am also not a coder!! Please tell me if I got anything wrong or did something stupid in the definition. I am fairly new to Janitor haha.

As always, please feel free to leave feedback and I hope you enjoy the bot <3
